_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: Stringent gating for GFP was applied to effectively segregate GFP+ and GFP- tumor populations and to reduce cross-contamination
details: Enabled effective segregation of GFP+ and GFP- tumor populations with stringent gating to reduce cross-contamination for functional studies
